children.heading: Conservation Area
children.label: A Conservation Area
children.text: The term “Conservation Area” means the Numunaa Nobe National Conservation Area established by paragraph (2).

children.heading: Management plan
children.label: B Management plan
children.text: The term “management plan” means the management plan for the Conservation Area developed under paragraph (3)(B).

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: C Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: To conserve, protect, and enhance for the benefit and enjoyment of present and future generations the cultural, archaeological, natural, wilderness, scientific, geological, historical, biological, wildlife, educational, recreational, and scenic resources of the Conservation Area, subject to valid existing rights, there is established the Numunaa Nobe National Conservation Area in the State of Nevada, to be administered by the Secretary.

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: The Conservation Area shall consist of approximately 160,224 acres of public land in Churchill County, Nevada, as generally depicted on the map entitled “Churchill County Proposed Fallon Range Training Complex Modernization and Lands Bill” and dated .November 30, 2022

children.heading: Availability of map
children.label: ii Availability of map
children.text: The map described in clause (i) shall be on file and available for public inspection in the appropriate offices of the Bureau of Land Management.

children.label: I
children.text: this section;

children.label: II
children.text: the Federal Land Policy and Management Act of 1976 ( et seq.); and43 U.S.C. 1701

children.label: III
children.text: any other applicable law; and

children.label: ii
children.text: as a component of the National Landscape Conservation System.

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: Not later than 2 years after , the Secretary shall develop a management plan for the Conservation Area.December 23, 2022

children.label: I
children.text: appropriate Federal, State, Tribal, and local governmental entities; and

children.label: II
children.text: members of the public.

children.label: I
children.text: describe the appropriate uses of the Conservation Area;

children.label: II
children.text: in accordance with paragraph (5), authorize the use of motor vehicles in the Conservation Area, where appropriate, including for the maintenance of existing roads; and

children.label: III
children.text: incorporate any provision of an applicable land and resource management plan that the Secretary considers to be appropriate, to include the Search and Rescue Training Cooperative Agreement between the Bureau of Land Management and the Naval Strike and Air Warfare Training Center dated , and the Carson City District BLM Administrative Guide to Military Activities on and Over the Public Lands dated .July 6, 1998January 25, 2012

children.heading: Uses
children.label: 4 Uses
children.text: The Secretary shall allow only those uses of the Conservation Area that the Secretary determines would further the purposes of the Conservation Area.

children.heading: Motorized vehicles
children.label: 5 Motorized vehicles
children.text: Except as needed for administrative purposes, planned military activities authorized by paragraph (3)(B)(iii)(III), or to respond to an emergency, the use of motorized vehicles in the Conservation Area shall be permitted only on roads and trails designated for the use of motorized vehicles by the management plan.

children.label: i
children.text: all forms of entry, appropriation, and disposal under the public land laws;

children.label: ii
children.text: location, entry, and patent under the mining laws; and

children.label: iii
children.text: disposition under all laws relating to mineral and geothermal leasing or mineral materials.

children.heading: Additional land
children.label: B Additional land
children.text: If the Secretary acquires mineral or other interests in a parcel of land within the Conservation Area after , the parcel is withdrawn from operation of the laws referred to in subparagraph (A) on the date of acquisition of the parcel.December 23, 2022

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Subject to subparagraph (B), nothing in this section affects the jurisdiction of the State of Nevada with respect to fish and wildlife, including hunting, fishing, and trapping in the Conservation Area.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: i Regulations
children.text: The Secretary may designate by regulation areas in which, and establish periods during which, no hunting, fishing, or trapping will be permitted in the Conservation Area, for reasons of public safety, administration, or compliance with applicable laws.

children.heading: Consultation required
children.label: ii Consultation required
children.text: Except in an emergency, the Secretary shall consult with the appropriate State agency and notify the public before taking any action under clause (i).

children.heading: Grazing
children.label: 8 Grazing
children.text: In the case of land included in the Conservation Area on which the Secretary permitted, as of , livestock grazing, the livestock grazing shall be allowed to continue, subject to applicable laws (including regulations).December 23, 2022

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Nothing in this section creates a protective perimeter or buffer zone around the Conservation Area.

children.heading: Activities outside Conservation Area
children.label: B Activities outside Conservation Area
children.text: The fact that an activity or use on land outside the Conservation Area can be seen or heard within the Conservation Area shall not preclude the activity or use outside the boundary of the Conservation Area.

children.heading: Military overflights1So in original. Two pars. (10) have been enacted.1
children.label: 10 Military overflights1So in original. Two pars. (10) have been enacted.1
A
children.text: low-level overflights of military aircraft over the Conservation Area, including military overflights that can be seen or heard within the Conservation Area;

children.label: B
children.text: flight testing and evaluation; or

children.label: C
children.text: the designation or creation of new units of special use airspace, or the establishment of military flight training routes, over the Conservation Area.

children.heading: Effect on water rights1
children.label: 10 Effect on water rights1
children.text: Nothing in this section constitutes an express or implied reservation of any water rights with respect to the Conservation Area.
